mapper.select: SELECT * FROM blog_comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM blog_comment WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blog_comment WHERE status = 0 AND deleted = 0
